name: ui-component-creation
description: Creates UI components using shadcn/ui and design system patterns
capabilities: Generate React 19 components with shadcn/ui patterns
Apply design tokens for consistent theming
Implement accessibility attributes and ARIA labels
Add responsive breakpoints and all interaction states
Follow brand guidelines for visual distinctiveness
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: This is a pure markdown documentation skill containing only guidelines for creating UI components. No executable code, scripts, network calls, or file system operations exist beyond reading documentation. The static analyzer findings are completely erroneous - the skill is safe and contains no security risks.
valueStatement: Generate consistent, accessible UI components that follow design system guidelines. Ensures visual distinctiveness, brand alignment, and accessibility compliance for every component.
userTitle: Create UI Components with shadcn/ui Patterns
limitations: Requires existing shadcn/ui component library installation
Requires access to DESIGN-SYSTEM.md for token definitions
Does not create new design tokens or modify design system

useCases.title: Build Consistent Components
useCases.description: Create new React components that match existing design patterns and brand guidelines

useCases.title: Translate Designs to Code
useCases.description: Convert design specifications into accessible, production-ready component code

useCases.title: Rapid Prototyping
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold UI components with proper structure and accessibility built-in

promptTemplates.title: Basic Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a card component using shadcn/ui patterns. Use the design system tokens for colors and spacing. Include title and description props.

promptTemplates.title: Form Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a form component with text input and submit button. Apply focus states, error handling, and accessibility labels. Use design tokens.

promptTemplates.title: Interactive Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a modal component with open, close, and loading states. Include keyboard navigation and ARIA attributes. Match brand colors.

promptTemplates.title: Complex Dashboard Widget
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a dashboard widget showing metrics with chart placeholder, trend indicator, and action buttons. Handle all responsive breakpoints and accessibility requirements.

bestPractices: Always read DESIGN-SYSTEM.md before generating any UI component
Use design tokens (bg-bg-card, text-text-primary) instead of raw colors
Include all interaction states: hover, focus, active, disabled
antiPatterns: Using raw colors like bg-white instead of design tokens
Skipping accessibility attributes for keyboard users
Ignoring responsive breakpoints on complex layouts

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Works with any AI assistant that can read markdown guidelines.

faq.question: Does this create a full page or individual components?
faq.answer: Creates individual UI components. For full pages, compose multiple components following the same patterns.

faq.question: Can I use this with custom design systems?
faq.answer: Yes. Replace design token references with your own CSS variables or utility classes.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only generates code patterns. No user data is collected, stored, or transmitted.

faq.question: Why must I read DESIGN-SYSTEM.md first?
faq.answer: The design system file contains brand-specific color tokens and spacing values for consistency.

faq.question: How is this different from plain shadcn/ui?
faq.answer: Adds brand guidelines, accessibility requirements, responsive patterns, and quality gates.
